title: CBAM risks driving Europe’s machinery industry out of Europe [Promoted Content]
summary_full: As CBAM moves into its decisive phase, its design risks undermining Europe’s machinery industry. Companies are penalised for missing data that lies outside their control. Cost inflation, data gaps and missing export solutions are triggering production relocation and job losses in an industry vital to Europe’s climate ambitions.
